output:
========================================
PHASE 4: DOCKER PORT HARDENING
========================================

--- 4.1 Reading all docker-compose files ---

=== FILE: /opt/n8n/docker-compose.yml ===
services:
  postgres:
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - n8n-traefik_default
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: n8n
      POSTGRES_USER: n8n
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  n8n:
    image: n8nio/n8n:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - n8n-traefik_default
    environment:
      DB_TYPE: postgresdb
      DB_POSTGRESDB_HOST: postgres
      DB_POSTGRESDB_PORT: 5432
      DB_POSTGRESDB_DATABASE: n8n
      DB_POSTGRESDB_USER: n8n
      DB_POSTGRESDB_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
      N8N_HOST: n8n.marbomebel.ru
      N8N_PORT: 5678
      N8N_PROTOCOL: https
      WEBHOOK_URL: https://n8n.marbomebel.ru/
      N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL: https://n8n.marbomebel.ru/
      N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY}
      N8N_SECURE_COOKIE: ${N8N_SECURE_COOKIE}
      N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE: ${N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE}
      N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER: ${N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER}
      N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD: ${N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD}
      AMOCRM_DOMAIN: marbomebel
      AMOCRM_TOKEN: "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImp0aSI6IjQ3OTljY2UwYjkxYzgzMDJhM2Y0YTEzZGI3OGVkOTM0OTdlOTdkMTljZTA0MWUyNjM0ZTZjOTViMDFhYTk2ZTVhZjI3YmU2ODNkZTk5MTIwIn0..X7PISrIuuZ-NV_9pr8XKCAwuxyGgP6c5_2TVKH5naq-rFjjbA3GQhE4MYvWfKVMOv2J9rGUmr-93HQBN-6g3_0XR_mSIo5C28X5BQ9WiO2wriFY7UDVz5O5xLPIk1s-TRYYOFNqK-hid-XVQOsabTEDiGhA_LnGc3ceS_s4xkcVddgQxb5vam1yiEjEYTGr3tJzJz8glDEkC2L-3ID9AVl3uo4xQ8A-B5iphl1_IJST1aK9OoCwbgbvcMybm997ynwPynk9qA4atxnEahWwoWbVga2N5rbxD3UJES-W0SRP2Jqobi5QZ13ez8t5jzXNAT7fh51LAo54TRDq_6iB5IQ"
      GENERIC_TIMEZONE: ${GENERIC_TIMEZONE}
      TZ: ${TZ}
      N8N_PROXY_HOPS: "1"
    volumes:
      - n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.routers.n8n.rule=Host("n8n.marbomebel.ru")
      - traefik.http.routers.n8n.entrypoints=websecure
      - traefik.http.routers.n8n.tls=true
      - traefik.http.routers.n8n.tls.certresolver=mytlschallenge
      - traefik.http.services.n8n.loadbalancer.server.port=5678

  voice-app:
    image: nginx:alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - n8n-traefik_default
    volumes:
      - /root/n8n-automation/pwa:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro
      - /root/n8n-automation/pwa/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.routers.voice.rule=Host("n8n.marbomebel.ru") && PathPrefix("/voice")
      - traefik.http.routers.voice.entrypoints=websecure
      - traefik.http.routers.voice.tls=true
      - traefik.http.routers.voice.tls.certresolver=mytlschallenge
      - traefik.http.routers.voice.priority=100
      - traefik.http.middlewares.voice-strip.stripprefix.prefixes=/voice
      - traefik.http.routers.voice.middlewares=voice-strip
      - traefik.http.services.voice.loadbalancer.server.port=80

networks:
  n8n-traefik_default:
    external: true

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  n8n_data:

=== FILE: /opt/openclaw/docker-compose.yml ===
services:
  openclaw:
    image: alpine/openclaw:latest
    container_name: openclaw
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - n8n-traefik_default
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.routers.openclaw.rule=Host("claw.marbomebel.ru")
      - traefik.http.routers.openclaw.entrypoints=websecure
      - traefik.http.routers.openclaw.tls=true
      - traefik.http.routers.openclaw.tls.certresolver=mytlschallenge
      - traefik.http.services.openclaw.loadbalancer.server.port=18789

networks:
  n8n-traefik_default:
    external: true

=== FILE: /opt/clawtest/docker-compose.yml ===
services:
  whoami:
    image: traefik/whoami
    container_name: clawtest-whoami
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - n8n-traefik_default
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.routers.clawtest.rule=Host("claw.marbomebel.ru")
      - traefik.http.routers.clawtest.entrypoints=websecure
      - traefik.http.routers.clawtest.tls=true
      - traefik.http.routers.clawtest.tls.certresolver=mytlschallenge
      - traefik.http.services.clawtest.loadbalancer.server.port=80

networks:
  n8n-traefik_default:
    external: true

command:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '========================================'
echo 'PHASE 4: DOCKER PORT HARDENING'
echo '========================================'

echo ''
echo '--- 4.1 Reading all docker-compose files ---'

for f in /opt/n8n/docker-compose.yml /opt/openclaw/docker-compose.yml /opt/clawtest/docker-compose.yml; do
  echo ''
  echo "=== FILE: $f ==="
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
    cat "$f"
  else
    echo 'NOT FOUND'
  fi
done

echo ''
echo '--- 4.2 WordPress compose (find) ---'
find /opt /root
intent: Phase 4: Read docker-compose files and identify all exposed services
